titleStmt.title: SII 6.1182: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 1182. (A.R. No. 365-XV of 1899). ON THE WALL TO THE PROPER RIGHT OF THE WESTERN ENTRANCE INTO THE SAME MANDAPA.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Āsīt bharadvājapavitragōtrajassamastaśāstrārtthaparārttasāraḥ śrīkēśavāryyassatuyajvanāma
kō guruḥ paraṁ yō gruhamēdhadharmmiṇāṁ . tasyaurasōpyasti samastaśāstraśīlassutō yaśōbhi
rbhuvanēṣu biśrutaḥ sadāśrayassvāśramadharmmadharmmiṇāṁ śrīrāmasūrī bhuvi sūriṇāṁ varaḥ [. 1*] śākā
bdē nidhinētracaṁdraśaśibhirñātē ca mēṣaṁ gatē sūryyē sūrivarōyamatra divasē śaurē ca vārē ravēḥ pitrōḥ svasya ca maṁgalārttha
makhilakṣēmāya dīpaṁ dadau yāvat caṁdradivākaraṁ sruharayē siṁhācala sthāyinē [. 2*] svasti śrī . śakavarṣaṁbulu
1129 gunēṇṭi mēṣasaṁkrā(ṁ)ntinimittamuna śrīmat jīhari śrīnarasiṁhadēvaraku sakalakalāpariṇa
tulaina śrīrāmabhaṭṭōpādhyāyulu tama talli sūrannavvaku tama taṁḍri kēśavabhaṭṭōpādhyāyulaku dharmmu
vugāṁ beṭṭina Akhaṁḍadīpa mokkaṇṭiki Ī dēvaśrībhaṁḍāramunaṁdu [O]ḍkina bīragoṭṭapugadya
lu padi Ī māḍalu ḍuttāḍa narasiṁhamuniyati ceṟuvunaṁ beṭṭi groppiṁcuṭaṁ jēsi Ī ceṟuvuḍigiṭa puṭṭaṁḍunēṁdu
mu nēlaku ṟālupānti Ī polamuna phalabhōgamuna pratisaṁvatsaraṁbulaṁdu nitya narasihamānika māneṁḍu
nēti lekka nacaṁdrarkkamuṁ jellaṁggāladigā śrāvaṇasahitamugā peṭṭiri Ī dharmmu vuṁpiṁcchinavāru gaṁgakaṟuta vēyi gōdānamulu sēsina phalamu pa
ḍayaṁgalāru Ī dharmmuvu vighnamusēsinavāru gaṁggaka(ṁ)ṛtu vēyi kavilamōdāla vadhasēsina pāpamuna paḍaṁgalāru śatruṇāpi kritō dharmmaḥ
pālanīyō manīṣibhiḥ śatrurēva hi śatruḥ syātna dharmaḥ kasyaci(ṁ)dripuḥ . Ī dharmmamu śrīvaiṣṇava rakṣa .
Digital edition of SII 6.1182 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
